pilot.title: REFERENCE SITES
pilot.body: From the hangars of Lufthansa to the acid tanks of Aurubis. Browse our Case Studies and see how Geonyx solves problems where conventional concrete fails.

technology.title: TECHNICAL CENTRE
technology.body: We do not merely pour concrete — we engineer molecular matrices. Visit our library to access Technical Data Sheets (TDS), HSEQ certificates and laboratory analyses for compliance with EN 206.
